steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: Before the blank is an independent clause: Typically, underlines, scribbles, and notes left in the margins by a former owner lower a book's value. After the blank is a dependent clause (when the former owner is a famous poet like Walt Whitman) followed by an independent clause (such markings, known as marginalia, can be a gold mine to literary scholars).

steps.title: Apply the comma + coordinating conjunction rule
steps.content: A comma + coordinating conjunction is required to properly join two independent clauses with contrasting meaning. Choice A correctly uses value, but. The remaining options violate this rule by either omitting the required comma or omitting the conjunction altogether. That matches choice A — A is correct.
